scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter ./artifacts/country-draft run dev & PORT=4000 pnpm --filter ./artifacts/api-server run dev & wait
scripts.start: PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter ./artifacts/country-draft run serve & PORT=4000 pnpm --filter ./artifacts/api-server run start & wait
